latestIgtvVideos.title: Inquire Within
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
I was so moved by @inqlife’s new book, I wrote him a poem back and share in video above (warning there are a few F’bombs). If you cant play the sound, here is the poem: 
I fucking love the human being that wrote this book
And where each poem in it took
Took me to places deep inside
Connected me with ever changing beliefs that often resemble a rollercoaster ride
Each poem in it is a gift, especially when read out loud
Thank you Adam for giving it to us, I could not be more proud
To call you a friend, to be witness and recipient of your art
And how bout that title Inquire Within, well that is just so fucking smart
Nothing could be more important during this precarious time, so I encourage everyone to go out and get a copy
I’m sure cherishing mine.
#inquirewithin #bookstagram

latestIgtvVideos.title: Meet Pat
latestIgtvVideos.caption: I'd like to introduce you to my good friend and @madefor co-founder, @Madefor_Pat! latestIgtvVideos.title: Madefor
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
Our mission is to help people realize their full potential and bring their best selves to the world. That's why my good friend @Madefor_Pat and I started @Madefor. We believe that a better world begins with the best you. Tag someone you think would be interested in Madefor below. For more info visit the link in my bio or go to GetMadefor.com. 
#GetMadefor

latestIgtvVideos.title: Enneagram
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
I get a lot of comments about the Enneagram asking what number I am. Well I am 100% a 7! As an "The Enthusiast” I find so much joy from all my different passions, but what the Enneagram has taught me is that I need to work on doing less, to feel more. What number are you? 
Comment below! 
#Enneagram #Enneagram7 #InnerWorkings #MondayMotivation

latestIgtvVideos.title: Scholarship
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
(Scholarship Closed: Recipient announced on 3/17) Calling all female entrepreneurs! I'm excited to announce my partnership with @AmyJoMartin and her #RenegadeBrandBootCamp to offer a $5,000 partial scholarship to help one recipient participate in the three-month intensive training program. To be considered, post a video on Instagram (make sure your account is public) telling us why this program would benefit you as an entrepreneur.

Plz tag both @amyjomartin and I in your post so we see your video and we will DM you a link to the application. Entry period ends on 3/3. Tag someone below who you think would be a fit!

For more info on the program: RenegadeBrandBootcamp.com #entrepreneurs #femaleentrepreneur #InnerAdventures

latestIgtvVideos.title: What I’m Reading in February
latestIgtvVideos.caption: Here are my February book suggestions. I encourage you to check them out and let me know what you think. I loved reading all of your feedback and book suggestions last month, so let's keep that conversation going. #bookstagram #mondaymotivation

latestIgtvVideos.title: Simplifying Your Life
latestIgtvVideos.caption: Don’t let unnecessary “stuff” clutter your mind. The smallest acts of simplifying your life can really help, and trust me, it feels so good! I challenge you to declutter your space this weekend and let me know how it made you feel. #simplifyyourlife #declutter

latestPosts.caption:
This journey taught me that worth isn’t something you earn, it’s something you remember.

ENOUGH came from that realization.

A reminder for myself and anyone walking their own path, this is a movement built to remind all of us that we are already enough.

#myenoughstory #weareenough

After selling his popular shoe brand TOMS in 2019, entrepreneur and founder @blakemycoskie fell into a deep depression and contemplated taking his own life. He then set out on a healing journey that led to his next venture: Enough bracelets.

100% of the profits from the bracelets will go to mental health organizations. Mycoskie told @gayleking about his mission: “If you tie your self-worth to achievement, you’re always going to fall short.”

72% of entrepreneurs are struggling with a real mental health challenge right now and the vast majority are telling nobody. I was one of them, building TOMS while silently falling apart, and I know how dangerous that silence can be. The strongest thing a founder can do is tell the truth about how they are actually doing.

#BlakeMycoskie #ENOUGH #Entrepreneurship

Anxiety fades when attention moves into creating and connecting with what’s in front of you. Even a small outlet like picking up a camera has helped quiet the noise and bring things back to the present.

#blakemycoskie #mentalhealth #positivity
latestPosts.alt: Photo by Blake Mycoskie on April 07, 2026. May be a meme of text that says 'Creativity is one of the most effective antidotes for anxiety. When I was dealing with anxiety, trying to think my way out of it didn't help. What helped was creating.'.

childPosts.alt: Photo by Blake Mycoskie on April 07, 2026. May be a meme of text that says 'Creativity is one of the most effective antidotes for anxiety. When I was dealing with anxiety, trying to think my way out of it didn't help. What helped was creating.'.

Photo by Blake Mycoskie on April 07, 2026. May be an image of camcorder, camera and text that says 'EICA M M6 B- R M LEICA ហា I picked up a camera, not to become a photographer, but to give myself a simple creative outlet. Over time, photographed more than fifty of the most important people in my life.'.

Photo by Blake Mycoskie on April 07, 2026. May be a meme of one or more people, beard and text that says 'What noticed was clear. When was creating, my mind stopped ruminating. My attention shifted away from my thoughts and toward the person in front of me. SON That shift matters because anxiety feeds on isolation and overthinking Creativity interrupts both. It creates focus, presence, and connection It might sound simple but it works.'.

Photo by Blake Mycoskie on April 07, 2026. May be a meme of poster and text that says 'Here's an east way to try this yourself: Take three portrait photos of you care about. No filters. No posting. Slow down, make eye contact, and be present. That interaction alone can Thainetininecene help regulate your nervous system. You don't need to be an artist. You just need to create.'.

latestPosts.caption:
A message to my 18 year-old self… 

#blakemycoskie #entrepreneur #mentalhealth
latestPosts.alt: Photo by Blake Mycoskie on April 06, 2026. May be an image of magazine, poster and text that says 'A message to Ty 18-year-old old self... Blake Mycoskie'.

childPosts.alt: Photo by Blake Mycoskie on April 06, 2026. May be an image of magazine, poster and text that says 'A message to Ty 18-year-old old self... Blake Mycoskie'.

Photo by Blake Mycoskie on April 06, 2026. May be an image of crossword puzzle and text that says 'You're going to spend the next 30 years trying to prove you're "enough." Tennis trophies. Business wins. •Accolades. •Money. You'll collect all of them. And none of them will quiet the voice inside you.'.

Photo by Blake Mycoskie on April 06, 2026. May be an image of magazine, poster and text that says 'You'll think hard work will save you. You'll launch your first business at 19. Manage 40 employees while your friends are at parties. Sell your first people graduate. •Compete on national TV. Start new ventures in your twenties. before most And yet, when the noise fades, you'll still feel that ache.'.

Photo by Blake Mycoskie on April 06, 2026. May be an image of text that says 'Then you'll take a trip to Argentina that changes everything. You'll play polo, drink wine, and stumble into the idea that becomes TOMS. It will grow into a global movement, helping create a new category of conscious capitalism. Nearly 100 million shoes donated. Awards. NYT bestseller. "40 Under 40." You'll make more money than you ever imagined. And you'll think, "This has to be what enough feels like." It won't be.'.

Photo by Blake Mycoskie on April 06, 2026. May be an image of magazine, poster and text that says 'Success will make you look invincible to the world, while quietly you'll be falling apart. The dream house. The adventures. The marriage. •The The freedom. Externally everything will be perfect. Internally Interalyoulfeorelosthaneve you'll feel more lost than ever.'.

Photo by Blake Mycoskie on April 06, 2026. May be an image of poster, magazine and text that says 'In 2019, after selling , everything you've avoided will catch up. Not because you did anything wrong. But because the old program you've run your whole life finally stops working. Depression won't whisper. It will roar. And it will nearly take you from this world.'.

Photo by Blake Mycoskie on April 06, 2026. May be an image of poster, magazine and text that says 'But here's the part you won't believe yet: The depression isn't punishment. It's a teacher. It will force you inward. To heal the wound you've carried since you were a kid: "I'm not enough." This becomes the hardest, and most important, work of your life.'.

Photo by Blake Mycoskie on April 06, 2026. May be an image of text that says 'You'll reinvent yourself again. Support veterans healing from PTSD. Give millions away. Build wellness companies. You'll study every tool for healing: therapy, meditation, mantra, breathwork. Slowly, you'll come back to yourself. Not the entrepreneur. Not the "Chief Shoe Giver." Just Blake.'.

Photo by Blake Mycoskie on April 06, 2026. May be an illustration of poster, magazine and text that says 'And in 2026, you'll launch the thing you needed most at 18. A cultural intervention called ENOUGH. A reminder you spent decades chasing but never believing: You were always enough. And so is everyone else.'.

Photo by Blake Mycoskie on April 06, 2026. May be an image of text that says 'So here's my message to you at 18: Accomplishments will not save you. People's approval will not save you. •Money will not save you. •Only honesty will. Only healing will. Only turning inward will. And when you finally do, you'll realize the truth that took you 49 years to learn: You've been ENOUGH all along. BlakMycoskie Blake Mycoskie'.

latestPosts.caption:
Even the most naturally optimistic people can find themselves lost when purpose, community, and light quietly disappear all at once. Sometimes the perfect life on paper is missing the invisible things that kept you whole.

#blakemycoskie #mentalhealthawareness #positivity

When generosity becomes part of your business DNA, not just a checkbox, it stops being a cost and starts becoming your greatest competitive edge.

#blakemycoskie #purposedrivenbusiness #givingback

latestPosts.caption:
You don’t need to overhaul your life. Just protect those first 20 minutes of your morning. See what happens!

#blakemycoskie #research #positivity

Should people actually use the “fake it till you make it” advice??

Blake Mycoskie thinks so!

Dress the part. Talk like it’s already happening. Move like you belong.

Because sometimes… confidence comes first and results come later.

@blakemycoskie x @weareenough x @davidnovak 

#leadership #fakeittillyoumakeit #success #entrepreneur #podcastclips

For years I was using success to regulate how I felt, and from the outside it looked like drive but on the inside I was just trying to feel okay. I learned the hard way that no amount of winning can fix the feeling that something is missing. 

A better life doesn't start when everything works, it starts when you stop needing everything to work just to feel okay.

#BlakeMycoskie #ENOUGH #MentalHealth
latestPosts.alt: Photo by Blake Mycoskie on April 04, 2026. May be a meme of one or more people, vulture and text that says 'A lot of people don't realize this, but they're using success to regulate how they feel. Here's how: Good day? They feel calm. Bad day? They feel anxious. So they chase the next thing that makes them feel okay.'.

childPosts.alt: Photo by Blake Mycoskie on April 04, 2026. May be a meme of one or more people, vulture and text that says 'A lot of people don't realize this, but they're using success to regulate how they feel. Here's how: Good day? They feel calm. Bad day? They feel anxious. So they chase the next thing that makes them feel okay.'.

Photo by Blake Mycoskie on April 04, 2026. May be a meme of one or more people, beard and text that says 'did this for years. When things were working, I felt relief. When they weren't, felt pressure in my chest. So kept pushing. Not because was inspired, but because winning was the only time felt settled. From the outside, it looked like progress. Inside, was just trying to feel okay.'.

Photo by Blake Mycoskie on April 04, 2026. May be an image of one or more people, beard, poster and text that says 'Here's what learned the hard way: If you only feel okay when things go right, your life will always feel unstable. Because life goes wrong... ...a lot. And no amount of winning can fix that. What actually helped wasn't doing more. It was stopping and asking myself one question: Can be okay before this gets better?'.

Photo by Blake Mycoskie on April 04, 2026. May be a Twitter screenshot of one or more people, beard and text that says 'Not fixing the feeling. Not chasing relief. Just letting it pass without earning my worth back. That's where things started to ochange. A better life doesn't start when everything works. It starts when you stop needing ever everything to work just to feel okay.'.

latestPosts.caption:
Every single day someone is healing, getting sober, and winning and that is proof the human journey is worth staying for. 

#BlakeMycoskie #ENOUGH #MentalHealth

For almost fifty years I never let myself feel sad. After my divorce and my life falling apart, I finally stopped running and realized that sadness is a lot easier to carry than hopelessness. Allowing yourself to feel what is there might be the most healing thing you ever do.

#BlakeMycoskie #ENOUGH #MentalHealth
